titleStmt.title: SII 11.138: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 138. (B.K. No. 215 of 1928-29.) BEḶVAṬIGI, NAVALGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE RĀMALIṄGADĒVA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This highly damaged inscription of the time of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) begins with a brief narration of the genealogy of the king, from Tailapa (Taila II) and registers a gift of land, made by Bairumbara Mallimayya, (or Mallaṇa) to the temples of Bairumbēśvara and Sarasvatī, built by him at Beḷḷiṭṭage. The land was purchased by him from the Twelve Gāvuṇḍas of the village headed by the Ūroḍeya and was situated in the locality called Daṇḍuḷabāgu.

The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 18, Śrīmukha, Paushya, śu. 11, Sunday, vyatīpāta, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa. The tithi quoted fell not on Sunday but on Saturday and occurred a week after the Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, i.e., on Saturday, Pushya śu. 4 = December 24, A.D. 1093.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© jayatyāviṣkṛtaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇō graviśrāntabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ ©
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarā mūlastaṁbhā ya śaṁbhavē .
śrīmaccāḷukyavaṁśaprabhavaṁ tānesedaṁ muṁnamā tailapaṁ śrī rā bhū pā
vikramāditya nurvvīrāmaṁ saṁ dayyaṇāṁkaṁ ripugajajaya pratā
ddāmaṁ t® sōvidēvakṣitīśa . kuḷaśaiḷēṁdraṁ muṁni
saṁdāṁtaraṁ ydāydu koṁdikki
traibhuvana neṁbinaṁ pāḷisidanavaniyaṁ vi tyadēva
svasti samastabhuvanā prithvīvallabha mahārājādhi mēśvaraṁ pa
ramabhaṭṭārakaṁ kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābhara ttribhu
vanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivriddhipra
namācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire .
mirppa vibudhāvaḷiyiṁ
dame vipra
ṇamenō moppuvudīdharayoḷintu
pāragana śrī paṁḍitakaḷpōrvvīru
rddamadhuva daṁḍādhīśa . vipuḷānēkadigaṁta
śāstrapurāṇa
gōtrapayōrāśisudhāka
dhīśanurvvīstuta . śaraṇeṁdaṁgeredoṁge maccarisutirppaṁgeṁdu māvajrapaṁjaramā
kalpamahījamā negarda dharmmādhīśaroḷkāva bērppari gārttīva raṇāgradoḷtoḍa rddaraṁ ko
lvo marttyadoḷdoreyeṁguṁ dhare kūrttu beḷḷiṭṭageyī pannirvvaruṁ gauḍara . parahita
kāryyatatpara nudāraguṇānvita nīśapādapaṁkaruhaśiḷīmukhaṁ guṇagaṇāśraya
niṣṭaviśiṣṭapaṁḍitōtkarasurabhūruhaṁ sakaḷaśāstrakaḷāvida neṁdu baṇnikuṁ dhare piridoṁdu
rāgadoḷ mallana nartthijanakke nallana . Ātana vanita patibrata mātēṁ cāri
trado ḷsuśīḷadoḷupamātītaṁ pāmarakulasaṁjātaya nivaḷajikabbeyaṁ pōlva
varāru . suragēhaṁ suralōkadiṁdogedudō mēṇ ruṁdranāgēṁdramaṁdiramettaṁ
dudo nāgalōkadi niḷābhāga kkideṁbanna moppire beḷḷiṭṭageyallimāḍisida nīśāvāsa
maṁ sthāyiyāgire bairuṁbara mallimayyane valaṁ dhanyaṁ peṟardhanyarē . neredi
rddūroḍeyarggapuṁḍugaḷmaṁ sauvarṇnadiṁ pūjisuttira loldaṁta vari
budeṁdaydu mattaranā daṁḍuḷabāginalli paḍedittaṁ muṁne tāṁ māḍidīśvaradēvargga
da naṁgabhōgamenisalu bairuṁbarīmallaṇa [.] Ā madhusūdhanāgratanayaṁ vibhu
kēśavarājanuṁ yaśōdhāmarenippa gauḍugaḷmaṁ dame pūjisalkava rttāmosa
dīyalākramadi nāsthaḷadoḷpaḍadoṁdu mattara bhūmiya nitta nātmakritasāgva
dhupūjege mallanartthiyiṁ . Intāṟa�ṁ matta
kādaṁ sadākāla ntanniṣṭārtthasaukhyaṁgaḷa nanubhavikuṁ kāyadirddāta nākalpāntaṁ duḥ
khābdhiyoḷmā�de muḷugutta mūḍutta mōraṁtirikkuṁ bhrāntē nīdharmmameṁ
duṁ kiḍade naḍevuda kkeyde caṁdrārkkatāraṁ . © svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikra
makālada 18 neya śrīmukha saṁvatsarada pauśya sudhdha 11 Ādityavāra vyatīpā
ta Uttarāyaṇasaṁkramaṇadaṁdu śrīmat beḷḷiṭṭageyūroḍeyapramukha
paṁnirvvarggāvuṁḍugaḷa kayyala vokkalamagaṁ bairuṁbara mallimayyaṁ tāvu muṁne
māḍisida bairuṁbēśvaradēvargga malliya sarasvatīdēviya raṁgabhōgakkaṁ
baṁtāgire daṁḍuḷabāginalli Ārumattarkaiyyaṁ paḍedu koṭṭa nintīdharmmamaṁ svadharmmadiṁ prati
pāḷisuvaru . dānaṁ vā pālanaṁ vēti dānātchrēyōnupālanaṁ dānātsvarggamavā pnōti
pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 11.138 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
